description: CompositionBerry and black blouson in chiffon, with a V-neckline, drawstrings at the waist to customize the Fit FittingRegularWash care Wash with similar colours Wash and iron inside out The blouson oozes  feminity and comfort. Slip into a spaghetti string top underneath the blouson to transform it into  sensuous party wear. Team it with leggings or slim fit denims and stilettos and you are all ready to hit the floors.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
